headline: Open-weights coding models and inference efficiency techniques dominated this week's rotation.
body: A cluster of efficiency techniques broke out together, with memory eviction, quantization, scheduling, advantage weighting, and adaptive computation all leading or surging in momentum. On the model side, new open-weights releases pushed coding and long-context workflows forward: MiniMax M3 supports million-token context windows and Anthropic and OpenAI endpoint compatibility, and GLM 5.2 is reviewed as a top open-source model spanning code generation, 3D, and visualization. Kernel fusion drew attention through OpenRouter's Fusion system, which routes prompts across multiple models and synthesizes a unified output at lower cost. Agent skills and tool-use themes also recurred across agent infrastructure for password management, XR wearables, and cross-tool context.
